entry.title: Tour de France 2020 - Hugo Hofstetter : ‘Je peux nourrir quelques regrets’

link.title: Tour de France 2020 - Hugo Hofstetter : ‘Je peux nourrir quelques regrets’

entry.content: Hugo Hofstetter, le sprinteur de l’équipe Israel Start-Up Nation, a fini 4e de la 3e étape du Tour de France 2020 remportée par Caleb Ewan (Lotto Soudal). Un bon résultat pour le Français qui avait tout de même une pointe de regrets après l’arrivée.
entry.summary: Hugo Hofstetter, le sprinteur de l’équipe Israel Start-Up Nation, a fini 4e de la 3e étape du Tour de France 2020 remportée par Caleb Ewan (Lotto Soudal). Un bon résultat pour le Français qui avait tout de même une pointe de regrets après l’arrivée.

entry.title: Father Destroys Son In Water HORSE Game

link.title: Father Destroys Son In Water HORSE Game

entry.content: 49-year-old Larry and his 23-year-old son Taylor compete over everything! Naturally, the biggest slice of Taylor’s birthday cake wasn’t safe from their shenanigans. Larry challenged Taylor to a game of HORSE in the pool while mom Renee filmed the whole thing. The competition was tight, but Larry took the win right at the end.
entry.summary: 49-year-old Larry and his 23-year-old son Taylor compete over everything! Naturally, the biggest slice of Taylor’s birthday cake wasn’t safe from their shenanigans. Larry challenged Taylor to a game of HORSE in the pool while mom Renee filmed the whole thing. The competition was tight, but Larry took the win right at the end.

entry.title: Prise en main du Galaxy Z Fold 2 : le nouveau smartphone pliant de Samsung

link.title: Prise en main du Galaxy Z Fold 2 : le nouveau smartphone pliant de Samsung

entry.content:
Il avait été brièvement montré le 5 août dernier lors de la présentation du Galaxy Note 20 : le Galaxy Z Fold 2 vient enfin d’être présenté par Samsung.
Chez 01net, nous avons eu la chance de pouvoir le découvrir en avant-première. Nicolas Lellouche, journaliste à la rédaction nous livre ses premières impressions en vidéo.
entry.summary: Il avait été brièvement montré le 5 août dernier lors de la présentation du Galaxy Note 20 : le Galaxy Z Fold 2 vient enfin d’être présenté par Samsung. Chez 01net, nous avons eu la chance de pouvoir le découvrir en avant-première. Nicolas Lellouche, journaliste à la rédaction nous livre ses premières impressions en vidéo.

entry.title: Top New Motorcycles For Short Riders

link.title: Top New Motorcycles For Short Riders

entry.content: Motorcycles that fit short riders aren’t easy to find. But we found them. Our list of different—and better—options.
entry.summary: Motorcycles that fit short riders aren’t easy to find. But we found them. Our list of different—and better—options.

entry.title: Pepper tree grows out of toilet floor in Chinese dorm

link.title: Pepper tree grows out of toilet floor in Chinese dorm

entry.content:
A pepper tree was spotted growing out of the toilet floor in a dorm at South China University Of Technology.
The video, filmed in the city of Guangzhou in Guangdong Province on August 29, shows a pepper tree growing out the side of a toilet.
Since it was not convenient for the students to use the toilet, they broke the tree to remove it.
According to reports, the students were not in the dorm for eight months due to the coronavirus outbreak.
The video was provided by local media with permission.
entry.summary: A pepper tree was spotted growing out of the toilet floor in a dorm at South China University Of Technology. The video, filmed in the city of Guangzhou in Guangdong Province on August 29, shows a pepper tree growing out the side of a toilet. Since it was not convenient for the students to use the toilet, they broke the tree to remove it. According to reports, the students were not in the dorm for eight months due to the coronavirus outbreak. The video was provided by local media with permission.

entry.title: Syed Saddiq reveals why he’s not joining Dr M’s Pejuang

link.title: Syed Saddiq reveals why he’s not joining Dr M’s Pejuang

entry.content:
Former Bersatu Youth chief Syed Saddiq Syed Abdul Rahman’s new political movement, will be independent of Pejuang, the new political party formed by Dr Mahathir Mohamad.
In an interview with Malaysiakini, the Muar MP revealed why he decided not to join his political mentor.
entry.summary: Former Bersatu Youth chief Syed Saddiq Syed Abdul Rahman’s new political movement, will be independent of Pejuang, the new political party formed by Dr Mahathir Mohamad. In an interview with Malaysiakini, the Muar MP revealed why he decided not to join his political mentor.

entry.title: Karan 01

link.title: Karan 01

entry.content:
From the Amazon prime Miniseries MADE IN HEAVEN, Drama India 2019
Karan is a wedding planner based in New Delhi. He spends his spare time in clubs hooking up guys for one night. Only at the end, he realized that he had never forgotten his first love…
In 2018 India Supreme Court decriminalized sexual acts between consenting adults of the same sex. I want to dedicate this story to all the people persecuted because of their sexual orientation.
entry.summary: From the Amazon prime Miniseries MADE IN HEAVEN, Drama India 2019 Karan is a wedding planner based in New Delhi. He spends his spare time in clubs hooking up guys for one night. Only at the end, he realized that he had never forgotten his first love… In 2018 India Supreme Court decriminalized sexual acts between consenting adults of the same sex. I want to dedicate this story to all the people persecuted because of their sexual orientation.

entry.title: Peserta Audisi Bernyanyi dan Berpantun, Raditya Dika: Kayaknya Salah Kompetisi - SUCI 5

link.title: Peserta Audisi Bernyanyi dan Berpantun, Raditya Dika: Kayaknya Salah Kompetisi - SUCI 5

entry.content:
JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Para peserta audisi Stand Up Comedy Indonesia season 5 (SUCI 5) malah nyanyi dan berpantun ria.
Raditya Dika langsung bilang ke peserta kalau salah kompetisi.
—————————————————————————————————————–
SUCI 9 akan kembali lagi untuk menemani para pecinta setia Stand Up Comedy Indonesia, setelah vakum selama 1 tahun.
Sambil menunggu hadirnya SUCI 9 di layar kaca, tim KompasTV akan menampilkan kembali video-video yang menarik sekaligus mengundang tawa para penonton Stand Up Comedy.
SUCI akan bernostalgia melalui tayangan video dari SUCI 1 sampai SUCI 8.
Tentunya dengan penampilan dari komika-komika ternama, yang pada waktu itu sedang merintis karier mereka.
Untuk para pecinta SUCI yang mau request upload, silakan tinggalkan komen di bawah ya.
Follow Stand Up Comedy KompasTV di Instagram: @sucikompastv untuk tahu informasi-informasi terupdate Stand Up Comedy Kompas TV, termasuk jadwal audisi.
#Audisi #StandUpComedy #SUCI5
entry.summary: JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Para peserta audisi Stand Up Comedy Indonesia season 5 (SUCI 5) malah nyanyi dan berpantun ria. Raditya Dika langsung bilang ke peserta kalau salah kompetisi. —————————————————————————————————————– SUCI 9 akan kembali lagi untuk menemani para pecinta setia Stand Up Comedy Indonesia, setelah vakum selama 1 tahun. Sambil menunggu hadirnya SUCI 9 di layar kaca, tim KompasTV akan menampilkan kembali video-video yang menarik sekaligus mengundang tawa para penonton Stand Up Comedy. SUCI akan bernostalgia melalui tayangan video dari SUCI 1 sampai SUCI 8. Tentunya dengan penampilan dari komika-komika ternama, yang pada waktu itu sedang merintis karier mereka. Untuk para pecinta SUCI yang mau request upload, silakan tinggalkan komen di bawah ya. Follow Stand Up Comedy KompasTV di Instagram: @sucikompastv untuk tahu informasi-informasi terupdate Stand Up Comedy Kompas TV, termasuk jadwal audisi. #Audisi #StandUpComedy #SUCI5

entry.title: Peep Show: Season 1, Episode 2 The Interview

link.title: Peep Show: Season 1, Episode 2 The Interview

entry.content: Jeremy’s band is going nowhere, so he reluctantly agrees to go for a job working in Mark’s office. Meanwhile, Mark’s attempts to flirt with Sophie backfire when he accidentally leads her to believe that he’s a Nazi.
entry.summary: Jeremy’s band is going nowhere, so he reluctantly agrees to go for a job working in Mark’s office. Meanwhile, Mark’s attempts to flirt with Sophie backfire when he accidentally leads her to believe that he’s a Nazi.

entry.title: Prasarana celebrates National Day 2020, announces initiatives to help local entrepreneurs

link.title: Prasarana celebrates National Day 2020, announces initiatives to help local entrepreneurs

entry.content:
Project Sejahtera 2020, held in conjunction with the country’s 63rd national day celebration on Monday by Prasarana Malaysia Berhad in collaboration with MRT Corp, hoped to nurture the spirit of patriotism and to re-appreciate the principles of Rukun Negara.
At the event, Prasarana chairman Datuk Seri Tajuddin Abdul Rahman also announced Prasarana’s latest initiative to help revive the country’s economy.
WATCH MORE:
SUBSCRIBE:
LIKE:
entry.summary: Project Sejahtera 2020, held in conjunction with the country’s 63rd national day celebration on Monday by Prasarana Malaysia Berhad in collaboration with MRT Corp, hoped to nurture the spirit of patriotism and to re-appreciate the principles of Rukun Negara. At the event, Prasarana chairman Datuk Seri Tajuddin Abdul Rahman also announced Prasarana’s latest initiative to help revive the country’s economy. WATCH MORE: SUBSCRIBE: LIKE:

entry.title: Omer sueños robados capítulo 156 (parte 1 ) lunes 24 de agosto del 2020 completo en español latino

link.title: Omer sueños robados capítulo 156 (parte 1 ) lunes 24 de agosto del 2020 completo en español latino

entry.content:
Todos los capítulos de Omer en español latino acá
Meryem es una joven que ha pasado los últimos cinco años criando a su hermano adoptivo Ömer, llegando a trabajar día y noche para que ambos tengan una vida decente. Solo era una adolescente cuando una persona le entregó a Ömer a su papá, quien al ser encarcelado vio frustrado su intento de vender al niño. Poco sabe ella que Ömer es el hijo secuestrado de un adinerado hombre, Levent Metehanoğlu, a quien conocerán inesperadamente. omer sueños robados audio latino
entry.summary: Todos los capítulos de Omer en español latino acá Meryem es una joven que ha pasado los últimos cinco años criando a su hermano adoptivo Ömer, llegando a trabajar día y noche para que ambos tengan una vida decente. Solo era una adolescente cuando una persona le entregó a Ömer a su papá, quien al ser encarcelado vio frustrado su intento de vender al niño. Poco sabe ella que Ömer es el hijo secuestrado de un adinerado hombre, Levent Metehanoğlu, a quien conocerán inesperadamente. omer sueños robados audio latino

entry.title: YouCut_20200901_192723905
entry.content: नाथद्वारा. शहर के लिए पेयजल की मुख्य लाइफलाइन नन्दसमंद बांध के छलकने के बाद मंगलवार को बांध पर 6 इंच की चादर चलने लगी। उधर बांध के छलकने के बाद 24 घंटे में भी बनास नदी में पानी नहीं गया और प्रशासन द्वारा खारी व भराई नहर को खोल दिया गया। जानकारी के अनुसार सोमवार रात ठीक दस बजे बांध के छलकने के बाद बांध पर मंगलवार को छह इंच की चादर चलने लगी, जिसे देखने कई लोग मौके पर पहुंचे। वहां का नजारा मनमोहक था। लोग अपने मोबाइल से फोटो लेने में लगे रहे।
entry.summary: नाथद्वारा. शहर के लिए पेयजल की मुख्य लाइफलाइन नन्दसमंद बांध के छलकने के बाद मंगलवार को बांध पर 6 इंच की चादर चलने लगी। उधर बांध के छलकने के बाद 24 घंटे में भी बनास नदी में पानी नहीं गया और प्रशासन द्वारा खारी व भराई नहर को खोल दिया गया। जानकारी के अनुसार सोमवार रात ठीक दस बजे बांध के छलकने के बाद बांध पर मंगलवार को छह इंच की चादर चलने लगी, जिसे देखने कई लोग मौके पर पहुंचे। वहां का नजारा मनमोहक था। लोग अपने मोबाइल से फोटो लेने में लगे रहे।

entry.title: #TDF2020 - Étape 5 Stage 5 - Daily Onboard Camera

link.title: #TDF2020 - Étape 5 Stage 5 - Daily Onboard Camera

entry.content:
Initialement prévu du 27 juin au 19 juillet, le Tour de France se déroulera sur le parcours prévu, sans changement, de Nice à Paris, du samedi 29 août au dimanche 20 septembre 2020. L’accent est mis sur une visite de l’ensemble des massifs montagneux du territoire : l’étalement, la variété et la raideur atypique des ascensions mettront à disposition des grimpeurs ambitieux des opportunités tout au long de l’épreuve, de l’arrivée d’Orcières-Merlette au chrono de la Planche-des-Belles-Filles, en passant par le Puy Mary, le Grand Colombier ou le col de la Loze en surplomb de Méribel.
The Tour de France 2020 defining characteristic is the inclusion of all the mountain ranges in France. The spread-out, varied and exceptionally steep climbs will give ambitious climbers one opportunity after another throughout the race, from the finish at Orcières-Merlette to the time trial on La Planche des Belles Filles, not to mention the Puy Mary, the Grand Colombier and the Col de la Loze, overhanging Méribel.
Plus d’informations sur / More information on:
Hashtag officiel / Official Hashtag: #TDF2020
© Amaury Sport Organisation - www.aso.fr
entry.summary: Initialement prévu du 27 juin au 19 juillet, le Tour de France se déroulera sur le parcours prévu, sans changement, de Nice à Paris, du samedi 29 août au dimanche 20 septembre 2020. L’accent est mis sur une visite de l’ensemble des massifs montagneux du territoire : l’étalement, la variété et la raideur atypique des ascensions mettront à disposition des grimpeurs ambitieux des opportunités tout au long de l’épreuve, de l’arrivée d’Orcières-Merlette au chrono de la Planche-des-Belles-Filles, en passant par le Puy Mary, le Grand Colombier ou le col de la Loze en surplomb de Méribel. The Tour de France 2020 defining characteristic is the inclusion of all the mountain ranges in France. The spread-out, varied and exceptionally steep climbs will give ambitious climbers one opportunity after another throughout the race, from the finish at Orcières-Merlette to the time trial on La Planche des Belles Filles, not to mention the Puy Mary, the Grand Colombier and the Col de la Loze, overhanging Méribel. Plus d’informations sur / More information on: Hashtag officiel / Official Hashtag: #TDF2020 © Amaury Sport Organisation - www.aso.fr

entry.title: US Stock Nears Record Highs

link.title: US Stock Nears Record Highs

entry.content:
US equities hovered near all-time highs on Wednesday.
Investors are studying healthy earnings results, positive economic data, and falling daily COVID-19 infections.
Salesforce, Urban Outfitters, and HP Enterprise all gained after beating Wall Street estimates for quarterly profits.
The Census Bureau said US durable-goods orders gained 11.2% in July.
The reading beat economists’ 4.8% estimate and it signaled a continued recovery in the nation’s manufacturing industry.
Oil prices climbed. West Texas Intermediate crude increased as much as 0.7%, to $43.67 per barrel.
entry.summary: US equities hovered near all-time highs on Wednesday. Investors are studying healthy earnings results, positive economic data, and falling daily COVID-19 infections. Salesforce, Urban Outfitters, and HP Enterprise all gained after beating Wall Street estimates for quarterly profits. The Census Bureau said US durable-goods orders gained 11.2% in July. The reading beat economists’ 4.8% estimate and it signaled a continued recovery in the nation’s manufacturing industry. Oil prices climbed. West Texas Intermediate crude increased as much as 0.7%, to $43.67 per barrel.

entry.title: POSSESSOR Official Uncut Trailer - Horror Cronenberg

link.title: POSSESSOR Official Uncut Trailer - Horror Cronenberg

entry.content: Possessor, an ultra-violent mind-fuck of a film, is almost ready to unleash its jarring horrors upon the world. Brandon Cronenberg‘s visceral nightmare is kind of like Inception meets Videodrome, and if that doesn’t get you excited, I don’t know what else to tell you. Andrea Riseborough plays a corporate assassin who has the ability to upload her consciousness into other people, and then use those people as pawns to pull off her murders. But when her latest host finds ways to resist her control, things get complicated. And bloody. Watch the Possessor trailer below.
entry.summary: Possessor, an ultra-violent mind-fuck of a film, is almost ready to unleash its jarring horrors upon the world. Brandon Cronenberg‘s visceral nightmare is kind of like Inception meets Videodrome, and if that doesn’t get you excited, I don’t know what else to tell you. Andrea Riseborough plays a corporate assassin who has the ability to upload her consciousness into other people, and then use those people as pawns to pull off her murders. But when her latest host finds ways to resist her control, things get complicated. And bloody. Watch the Possessor trailer below.

entry.title: Chinese Foreign Ministry denies intrusion attempt in Ladakh

link.title: Chinese Foreign Ministry denies intrusion attempt in Ladakh

entry.content: Chinese Foreign Ministry has denied yet another intrusion attempt by their troops on the southern bank of the Pangong Tso Lake area in eastern Ladakh on the intervening night of August 29-30.
entry.summary: Chinese Foreign Ministry has denied yet another intrusion attempt by their troops on the southern bank of the Pangong Tso Lake area in eastern Ladakh on the intervening night of August 29-30.

entry.title: Lady Gaga Waist-Length Pink Hair

link.title: Lady Gaga Waist-Length Pink Hair

entry.content: Lady Gaga and Ariana Grande are set to perform their hit song "Rain on Me" at tonight’s 2020 Video Music Awards, so of course, everyone is super-eager to see how they’ll do their hair and makeup. While there’s no word yet from Grande, it’s possible that Mother Monster gave fans a sneak peek of her hair look (although, knowing the singer’s style, there could very well be multiple looks). ‍♀️‍♀️" Additionally, Gaga’s go-to hair guy Frederic Aspras shared a teaser of his own on Instagram in the form of a video clip showing off a variety of hair dyes from Joicio — one of which happens to be pink.
entry.summary: Lady Gaga and Ariana Grande are set to perform their hit song "Rain on Me" at tonight’s 2020 Video Music Awards, so of course, everyone is super-eager to see how they’ll do their hair and makeup. While there’s no word yet from Grande, it’s possible that Mother Monster gave fans a sneak peek of her hair look (although, knowing the singer’s style, there could very well be multiple looks). ‍♀️‍♀️" Additionally, Gaga’s go-to hair guy Frederic Aspras shared a teaser of his own on Instagram in the form of a video clip showing off a variety of hair dyes from Joicio — one of which happens to be pink.

entry.title: Maddam Sir Latest Full Episode 1st September 2020 Ep. 59

link.title: Maddam Sir Latest Full Episode 1st September 2020 Ep. 59

entry.content:
About The Show:
—————————–
Set in Lucknow the show is based in one such all-women Police station made by 4 beautiful quirky women. Pushpa, the oldest of them, is the head constable who tries to balance her life between home and work. Karishma, the Sub Inspector, is fish out of the water as she is at loggerheads with the philosophy of the police station. She beats before she talks but now she has to solve all cases through reconciliation. Santosh Sharma is the young new recruit and a typical lonely girl in the city. The head of the pack is S.H.O Haseena Mallik, witty, romantic leads by example. The common challenge for all these women is to bring sensitivity to their policing while dealing with cases that come to this police station. Hence their solution is most unusual. The characters and the cases add to the fun and humour of the show. While Pushpa and Karishma are the saas-bahu duo, who keep us entertained by their Squabbles, it is Haseena - Karishma’s ideological differences which add to the drama and comedy. #maddamsir

entry.summary: About The Show: —————————– Set in Lucknow the show is based in one such all-women Police station made by 4 beautiful quirky women. Pushpa, the oldest of them, is the head constable who tries to balance her life between home and work. Karishma, the Sub Inspector, is fish out of the water as she is at loggerheads with the philosophy of the police station. She beats before she talks but now she has to solve all cases through reconciliation. Santosh Sharma is the young new recruit and a typical lonely girl in the city. The head of the pack is S.H.O Haseena Mallik, witty, romantic leads by example. The common challenge for all these women is to bring sensitivity to their policing while dealing with cases that come to this police station. Hence their solution is most unusual. The characters and the cases add to the fun and humour of the show. entry.title: The characters in ‘Black Panther’ are similar to real-life people [Mic Archives]

link.title: The characters in ‘Black Panther’ are similar to real-life people [Mic Archives]

entry.content: In ‘Black Panther,’ the fictional universe of Wakanda is influenced by traditions and practices across real-world Africa. The film’s characters also share characteristics with real-life black people. ‘Mic’ lists four black figures that the movie’s characters personify.
entry.summary: In ‘Black Panther,’ the fictional universe of Wakanda is influenced by traditions and practices across real-world Africa. The film’s characters also share characteristics with real-life black people. ‘Mic’ lists four black figures that the movie’s characters personify.

entry.title: Les anti-masques mobilisés en Allemagne

link.title: Les anti-masques mobilisés en Allemagne

entry.content: 18.000 personnes s’étaient donné rendez-vous samedi 29 août à la Porte de Brandebourg à Berlin. Une nouvelle mobilisation massive pour protester contre l’obligation du port du masque. Une manifestation pourtant interdite par la municipalité en raison de l’impossibilité de faire respecter les distances de sécurité. Les forces de police ont d’ailleurs dû intervenir pour disperser les manifestants anti-masques.
entry.summary: 18.000 personnes s’étaient donné rendez-vous samedi 29 août à la Porte de Brandebourg à Berlin. Une nouvelle mobilisation massive pour protester contre l’obligation du port du masque. Une manifestation pourtant interdite par la municipalité en raison de l’impossibilité de faire respecter les distances de sécurité. Les forces de police ont d’ailleurs dû intervenir pour disperser les manifestants anti-masques.

entry.title: India-China Tension: Hercules विमान का जमकर हो रहा है इस्तेमाल, जानिए इसकी खासियत वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: India-China Tension: Hercules विमान का जमकर हो रहा है इस्तेमाल, जानिए इसकी खासियत वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
The Indian Air Force (IAF) on Thursday successfully landed a C-17 Globemaster transport aircraft at the Mechuka Advanced Landing Ground (ALG) in Arunachal Pradesh. The move is aimed at calibrating India’s response capabilities at the border with China.
आसमान में उड़ता हुआ गजराज अमेरिका निर्मित हरक्यूलिस सी-130 जे दुनिया का सबसे बड़ा मालवाहक विमान है. हरक्यूलिस विमान जिसे भारत में ग्लोबमास्टर भी कहते हैं, 14 मिनट में 28 हजार फीट पर उड़ सकता है तीन अरब का हरक्यूलिस विमान का इस्तेमाल दुनिया के 60 से ज्यादा देशों में हो रहा है। भारत के पास 11 हरक्यूलिस एयरक्राफ्ट हैं।C-130J सुपर हरक्यूलिस केवल परिवहन विमान नहीं है, ये अपनी क्लास में सबसे ज्यादा ताकतवर और नवीनतम तकनीक से लैस हथियारों वाला एयरक्राफ्ट है।
#IndianAirForce #SuperHerculesJet #OneindiaHindi
entry.summary: The Indian Air Force (IAF) on Thursday successfully landed a C-17 Globemaster transport aircraft at the Mechuka Advanced Landing Ground (ALG) in Arunachal Pradesh. The move is aimed at calibrating India’s response capabilities at the border with China. आसमान में उड़ता हुआ गजराज अमेरिका निर्मित हरक्यूलिस सी-130 जे दुनिया का सबसे बड़ा मालवाहक विमान है. हरक्यूलिस विमान जिसे भारत में ग्लोबमास्टर भी कहते हैं, 14 मिनट में 28 हजार फीट पर उड़ सकता है तीन अरब का हरक्यूलिस विमान का इस्तेमाल दुनिया के 60 से ज्यादा देशों में हो रहा है। भारत के पास 11 हरक्यूलिस एयरक्राफ्ट हैं।C-130J सुपर हरक्यूलिस केवल परिवहन विमान नहीं है, ये अपनी क्लास में सबसे ज्यादा ताकतवर और नवीनतम तकनीक से लैस हथियारों वाला एयरक्राफ्ट है। #IndianAirForce #SuperHerculesJet #OneindiaHindi
